title: Animatic Title
description: Minecraft Title change to More unique!
body:
# Animatic Title
This mod is simple

Minecraft Title change to Animation Minecraft Title!

Like Floating logo...

### How looks like?

When the logo appears, it goes down from top to bottom and then floats and moves a little.

...well you should see this video

[![Image from Gyazo](https://i.gyazo.com/ae04d8bb06534d6388f43abf6573935b.gif)](https://gyazo.com/ae04d8bb06534d6388f43abf6573935b)
